calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
George R. Sullivan for petitioner Kevin Gorgen (via CourtCall).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee.

The Court inquired regarding the value of the trust assets. Mr. Sullivan estimated that the value of the trust assets was approximately $4 million. The Court stated that it would require a bond in an amount equal to the full net value of the trust assets.

The Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant and to fix bond consistent with the amount discussed.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
